case_title: SING TAO DAILY VS. LAW OFFICE OF ARNOLD LAUB

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-03-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-28-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE SHOWN IN COURT.
